summary: Completed Faza 4 testing: Dividende + Știri for Portofoliu BVB PRO. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend scenarios verified via Playwright. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/dividends returns exact values (BRD: 3.78%/211.62 RON, H2O: 6.08%/449.44 RON, total: 661.06 RON). GET /api/portfolio-bvb/news returns 8 tagged articles with H2O and BRD badges. Frontend renders all columns, metric card, and news section correctly.

issues: MINOR: 'Income Dividende/An' is the 5th card in a 4-column grid (grid-cols-4), so it renders alone in a 2nd row taking 1/4 width. Functionally correct but layout looks uneven. Consider adjusting grid to 5-column or placing it in row 1.

passed_tests: ✅ Dividends contain BRD and H2O symbols
✅ All dividend entries have required fields: symbol, trailing_annual_dividend, dividend_yield_pct, annual_income_ron, shares, source
✅ News returns 8 articles (max 8, API limit respected)
✅ All articles have required fields: title, source, published_at, related_symbols
✅ related_symbols is a list on all articles
✅ Tagged articles exist with H2O and/or BRD symbols
✅ All articles have valid published_at datetime strings
✅ Frontend: portfolio-table visible with 'Div Yield' and 'Income/an' columns
✅ Frontend: BRD row shows 3,78% in emerald green for Div Yield
✅ Frontend: BRD row shows 211,62 RON for Income/an
✅ Frontend: H2O row shows 6,08% in emerald green for Div Yield
✅ Frontend: H2O row shows 449,44 RON for Income/an
✅ Frontend: Metric card 'INCOME DIVIDENDE/AN' shows 661,06 RON in emerald green
✅ Frontend: Metric card subtitle 'BVB.ro confirmat' present
✅ Frontend: Total footer row shows 661,06 RON/an
✅ Frontend: H2O badges (bg-blue-100 text-blue-700) present on articles
✅ Frontend: BRD badge present on relevant article
✅ Frontend: Article images, source names, and dates displayed
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: Income Dividende/An metric card is the 5th card in a grid-cols-4 layout, rendering alone in a 2nd row. Consider using grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 or adding it to a different position.
NOTE: SYMBOL_SEARCH_TERMS maps 'TEL' to 'Transgaz' (same as TGN). This may cause double-tagging if both are in portfolio.

NOTE: news query searches title only (not title_ro) with regex but tagging logic checks both title+title_ro. This could lead to articles returned but with empty related_symbols if match is only in title_ro.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Demo portfolio (H2O: 50 shares @ 65 RON, BRD: 200 shares @ 15 RON) already in DB. bvb_dividends_scraped collection has BRD (1.0581 RON) and H2O (8.989 RON) dividend data. articles collection has 8+ articles matching H2O/BRD search terms.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Faza 4 fully verified. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/dividends: BRD (3.78%, 211.62 RON), H2O (6.08%, 449.44 RON), total=661.06 RON, source='BVB.ro (confirmat)'. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/news: 8 articles with H2O+BRD related_symbols tags, blue badges. Frontend: divMap correctly populates Div Yield + Income/an columns in table, metric card 'Income Dividende/An' shows only when total_annual_income > 0, PortfolioNewsSection renders news section. Both endpoints require PRO auth (401 without token). bvb_dividends_scraped MongoDB collection is the data source.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all tests passed, no bugs found
